name: Dingy Looking Stairwell
description: I'm in a Dingy Looking Stairwell
hints: A central stairwell with broken glass and multiple exits. The stairs lead up.
GO STAIRS to reach the parlor upstairs. Explore all directions.
NORTH to chapel, EAST to kettle room, WEST to dungeon, SOUTH to another room. GO STAIRS to parlor.
notes: Central stairwell hub. GO STAIRS reaches the parlor (room 20). Connects to chapel (N), kettle room (E), dungeon (W), and room 24 (S).
